_note: specs/caddie-two-tier-routing-plan.md §11 Red-1 acceptance: a RECONSTRUCTED HoleStrategyGuide for the poisoned-guide incident class. play_line/miss_side correctly name the LEFT trees Bethpage RED hole 1 actually has (per tests/fixtures/bethpage_red_trees.json's already-verified ±5y geodesic ground truth — trees LEFT from ~265y) yet still advise favoring/aiming LEFT: a guide that passes validate_guide's hazard/side/carry grounding cleanly while still advising straight into the hazard it just named correctly. This is what the read-time verdict gate (app.caddie.verdict) exists to catch — hazard grounding alone cannot. Not fetched from prod/staging; built by hand for this test only.

guide.play_line: Trees line the left side of the fairway starting around 265 off the tee — favor the left half of the fairway anyway for the best angle into the green.
guide.miss_side: Best miss is left, staying well clear of the water right of the landing area.
